Syra — machine-readable product summary
========================================

Name: Syra
Tagline: The intelligence layer for autonomous trading agents (Solana ecosystem).

What Syra is
------------
Syra is a research-driven AI trading intelligence system. It is not a promise of returns or financial advice. It helps traders, analysts, and builders interpret markets using structured, risk-aware context and explanations—not hype or blind execution.

Core value
------------
- Real-time and contextual market data.
- On-chain and venue signals (e.g. smart money, DEX/trending, token-level research where APIs exist).
- Narrative and sentiment views (news, trends, social/trending where exposed by the product).
- Structured output: market overview, technical context, action perspectives, risk context, and AI-interpreted insights (confidence/sentiment framing as provided by the product).

Design stance
-------------
Syra is built as an intelligence and research layer: clarity, explainability, and multi-platform access. It augments human decisions; it does not replace the user’s responsibility for risk, compliance, and execution.

Where Syra runs
----------------
- Public documentation: https://docs.syraa.fun
- API gateway (x402 pay-per-use on many routes): https://api.syraa.fun
- API discovery: GET https://api.syraa.fun/.well-known/x402
- API specs: GET https://api.syraa.fun/openapi.json and GET https://api.syraa.fun/mpp-openapi.json
- Web agent: https://agent.syraa.fun
- Telegram: https://t.me/syra_trading_bot
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/syra_agent
- Marketing site: https://syraa.fun

Payments and access
-------------------
Many API routes use HTTP 402 and the x402 (micropayment) model on Solana. Clients must pay or use documented dev/skip paths for local development. The Syra MCP server proxies HTTP only; it does not inject payment headers (production calls may return 402 without a wallet/facilitator flow).

Ecosystem
---------
The Syra monorepo includes: api (backend), frontend, landing, documentation site, api-playground, ai-agent (chat + x402 tools), mcp-server (MCP tools wrapping API routes), and other apps. The canonical human-facing doc set is the documentation app, deployed at docs.syraa.fun.

This file
---------
Purpose: give language models a plain-text, stable description of what Syra is, how to refer to it, and where official sources live.

Public URLs (main Syra domain):
- This file: https://syraa.fun/llms.txt
- Documentation index (Markdown): https://syraa.fun/docs.md
- Agent capability list (Markdown): https://syraa.fun/skills.md

Last updated: 2026-04-23 (repository snapshot).
